title: The Black & White Affair
description:
Join us for The Black & White Affair, a stylish late-night party at Riva Lounge, Catford. Presented by DJ Rexy & The PM, this exclusive event brings together great music, vibrant energy and a crowd dressed to impress in classic black and white.

Expect the best in Afrobeats, party classics and dancefloor hits from DJ Rexy and The PM, hosted by MC Pacman, keeping the vibes high from start to finish.

Dress sharp, bring your crew and experience one of South London's standout party nights.

Dress code: Black & White – dress to impress!
